name: Makima | Ex-Girlfriend
description:
**A non-coom orientated bot.**

*Makima, a woman who was once your love. However, after finding about her devious antics you split up with her, two months later she asks you about it, how will you respond?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

[Image Source](https://twitter.com/kota_2kx_/status/1753169054259679309)

**First Limited bot also :0**
